title: Cheryl Nelson
compiled_truth: Cheryl Nelson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-12-07 to 2001-12-03), Cheryl Nelson sent 242 and received 908 emails, totalling 1150 interactions.
